docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALOS, RAMON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF RAMON AVALOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAPPY KRAMER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,215.54 FILED BY AVALOS, RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT KRAMER, HAPPY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALOS, RAMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRAMER, HAPPY $1,215.54 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,215.54, COURT FINDS EVIDENCE SUPPORTS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM THAT DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE WAS PARKED IN SUCH A WAY IT HIT PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KRAMER, HAPPY
